prestazioni: OM 936 LA (6-cylinder, 7.7L turbo-diesel) engine remapped via **Dimsport Genius Blue** ECU with custom Stage 3+ tuning file for 420 HP and 1,400 Nm torque, optimized for high-altitude off-road conditions (fueling adjusted for 3,000m+ elevation)

**Garrett GTB2260VK** turbocharger upgrade with **BorgWarner EFR** wastegate actuator and **HJS** 200°C-rated downpipe for reduced backpressure, paired with **Mann+Hummel** high-flow air filter (PN: CUK 3336) for dust-heavy environments

**ZF 8HP90** 8-speed automatic transmission reinforced with **Sonax** full synthetic 80W-140 GL-5 gear oil and **Meyle** upgraded torque converter (PN: 014 007 0010) for 1,800 Nm input capacity, plus **ATS** billet differential covers (front/rear) with **ARB RD145** 40% lockers
estetica: **Kässbohrer** U5023-specific **Rock-Tec** front bumper with integrated **Warn Zeon 12-S** winch (12,000 lb capacity) and **PIAA LP570** LED light bar (50-inch, 10,000-lumen) mounted on **BWS Offroad** heavy-duty bull bar

**Alu-Karosse** modular expedition body kit with **Alubutyl** sound-deadening (3mm) and **Webasto** DualTop Evo roof tent (for U5023 wheelbase), paired with **BF Goodrich KM3** 44x19.5R20 tires on **AEV Salta HD** beadlock wheels (17x9, +38mm offset)

**Schmitz Cargobull** custom livery wrap in **3M 1080 Gloss Military Green (S344)** with **Oracal 970RA** reflective pinstriping (2mm) and **Hella** work lights (500W, 6000K) integrated into the **Mercedes-Benz Genuine** rear ladder (PN: A9064810088)
